source_title: Shoulder and Elbow: Next Generation in Repair and Reconstruction
text: in the lateral decubitus position. The STaR Sleeve™ arm holder is a soft foam traction boot designed to gently cradle the arm, forearm, and wrist during distal distraction in any desired position of abduction.
